seed: Does every real-analytic F with a fixed point of multiplier λ (|λ|≠0,1) admit a real-analytic half-iterate, and when is it unique?
_iron_rule: No node carries a status of unsolved/impossible/failed. The `location` geometry IS the status (plan §7.2).
_edges_basis: LLM-judged associations (no AUTO_DEV_EMBED_MODEL key) — coords are 2D associative placeholders, not embeddings (plan §7.3 fallback, R12).

nodes.statement: Koenigs linearization: if 0<|λ|<1 (or |λ|>1, λ not a root of unity), F is analytically conjugate to z↦λz via the Schröder function φ.
For hyperbolic λ>0, a real branch √λ>0 exists and f = φ⁻¹(√λ·φ) is a real-analytic half-iterate.
Compute φ as the Koenigs coordinate (engine.js solveSchroederHalfIterate); pull back √λ·φ. Covers the whole hyperbolic case.
For λ<0 the real square root √λ does not exist, so the Koenigs construction yields no REAL half-iterate; a real f tangent to √λ·z is obstructed.

location.gap_geometry: known obstruction: missing real branch of √λ (parity/orientation)

nodes.statement: The EXCLUDED boundary |λ|=1 (e.g. λ=1 parabolic): Koenigs fails; a Fatou/Abel coordinate is needed instead (engine.js solveParabolicHalfIterate).

location.gap_geometry: adjacent excluded region; handled by a different (Fatou) technique

nodes.statement: Among real-analytic germs tangent to √λ·z at the fixed point, the Koenigs coordinate is unique up to scaling ⇒ the half-iterate is unique once a branch of √λ is fixed (hyperbolic λ>0).

location.gap_geometry: one short rigidity argument from a landmark (near-landmark)

nodes.statement: Existence ⇔ existence of an analytic square root of the linear multiplier action; uniqueness ⇔ branch choice of √λ + germ rigidity (LE-uniqueness).

location.gap_geometry: equivalent restatement that exposes the λ-sign case-split

nodes.statement: Linear analogue: a real matrix M has a real square root iff each negative eigenvalue has even multiplicity — a cross-domain mirror of the λ>0 (vs λ<0) condition.

location.gap_geometry: cross-domain bridge: transfers the parity intuition for √λ

nodes.statement: THE SEED, positioned: 'every real-analytic F with |λ|≠0,1 admits a real-analytic half-iterate, with stated uniqueness.'

location.gap_geometry: NOT a yes/no — a case-geometry: (i) λ>0 essentially ANCHORED, 1 hop from Koenigs (L-halfiter-pos / A-schroeder); (ii) λ<0 meets a genuine real-branch OBSTRUCTION (O-neg-lambda), so the unrestricted claim is false-as-stated and the honest object is the boundary between the two; (iii) uniqueness is a near-landmark lemma (LE-uniqueness). Excluded |λ|=1 boundary handled separately (O-parabolic).

verification.checked_cases: λ>0 cases verified in engine.js; λ<0 obstruction exhibited at λ=-1
